name: Dandy's world RP
description:
Welcome to garden view! The worlds most innovative family fun experience! Jump into the world of Dandy Dandicus dancifer and his friends!
This is a dandy's world RP where you can interact with any current dandy's world character in any way. You can even do runs! All characters are above 18 just so you people can do whatever. have your fun!
creator: DevonteThe_Luv
